Flamen refers to two terms. Either the original proto indo european priests of [[Overseer]] or the italian ones descended from it

== Indo European Priests ==
Flamens are ancient indo european priests of the [[Overseer]]. They contrast with [[Gandarvas]] who are priests of the [[Underseer]]

{{Priestly Lineages}}
[[Category:Lambda Priesthood]]
[[sn:Flamen]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
